feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: been playing my board game again season 5 changes involve reducing the amount of…
entry.content: been playing my board game again season 5 changes involve reducing the amount of mana in the game because the last time i went on a binge the meta devolved into spamming high level fireballs at each other until you had like 3 pieces left most of the changes are to chaos, nerf to how much mana a K card gives and reworked the dragon piece, and reworked the card draw mechanics, made some small changes to how stuff works to prevent turn 1 check this is very exciting Your fortune: Better not tell you

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >"Gimme Shelter" features prominent guest vocals by American singer Merry Clayto…
entry.content: >"Gimme Shelter" features prominent guest vocals by American singer Merry Clayton. Clayton – about four months pregnant – made her recording with just a few takes. Upon returning home, Clayton suffered a miscarriage, attributed by some sources to her exertions during the recording. Any other bands that perform abortions?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Fuck TRUSTEDF57 - infinityhotel.it
entry.content: Hi, 4chan folks: I’m a new user and I have a request: could someone launch a massive DDoS attack against this website (TRUSTEDF57 - infinityhotel.it)? As many of you know, there was an earthquake in Venezuela and about 50,000 people are missing; however, because of the website I mentioned earlier, all information regarding the missing persons is being replaced by spam reports (promoting visits to that site).

entry.title: /int/ International: Air conditioning does not do what you think. Corporations have hynotized you int…
entry.content: Air conditioning does not do what you think. Corporations have hynotized you into thinking that it cools your home, but in reality what it does is take the hot air inside and then put it outside, which then goes back inside eventually. The hotter it is outside, the more air conditioning you need, and the more air conditioning you use, the hotter it is outside. Do not fall for this trap.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: “Triangle of Sadness” director Ruben Östlund reveals next movie’s plot details
entry.content: >“The Entertainment System Is Down” is a dark comedy disaster drama set aboard a long-haul flight from London to Sydney, starring Keanu Reeves, Kirsten Dunst, Woody Harrelson, Samantha Morton, Daniel Brühl, Joel Edgerton and Nicholas Brau, among others. A key group of the passengers are boisterous Australian cricket fans returning home after Australia has lost a series to England. Östlund said the characters were inspired partly by the legend of Australian cricketer David Boon, who reportedly dr

entry.content: I'm visiting my dad for a few weeks, brought my PS5 and am currently playing Trails Beyond the Horizon... and of course, I have everyone in the bunnysuits from the DLC. The only TV I had available is in the downstairs living room, and... MY DAD WALKED IN AND SAW A CUTSCENE WITH ALL THE GIRLS STANDING AROUND IN THE BUNNY SUITS, WITH THEIR ASSES AND TITS HANGING OUT... and I was getting ready to fap. (as if high T men ever experience the female only emotion of lonliness???? WTF?..) >"Nah I tons of stuff to do... in fact I am running behind now, see ya!" entry.title: /mu/ Music: Corny! Corny!! CORNY!!!!!!
entry.content: This is a real, genuine corny hillbilly maizefield bust down. Do the Corn Dog Twist. Canned corn slurry & calabash salad, calamari with garlic-corn rice sliders. Canadian corn whiskey from a corn foam-lined cask with canary island corn chili dressing. Fried corn casserole with baked aioli corn sluice. Calabrian corn tacos served after a Corsican ritual corn dance done to a corny polka beat.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Frontman Envy
entry.content: How do you feel after years spent learning your instrument, just for no one to notice or care even when your band does well? No one cares about the time you put in, your solo album, or those licks you practiced for hours. Get in your corner and play the cowboy chord, bitch. Personally I want to kill myself and cope with alcohol.
